work.description: Sole data function across four pilot customers. Shipped an agentic onboarding agent and the eval harness keeping it honest.
Fixed a stalled electrophysiology pipeline — 94% faster, $200K saved. Shipped an air-gapped clinical RAG on CPU.
Three teams' funnel metrics were lying to them. Fixed the tracking, wrote the spec, ran the tests.
My first real role. Mapped a funnel, lifted adoption 28%, automated the weekly report nobody enjoyed writing.
